_comment: Species: Ghost Spirit Beast (鬼灵兽) from I Shall Seal the Heavens. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Ghost Spirit Beast

canonical.appearance: Ghostly beast 4 m, body shifts between physical and ghost-form
canonical.behavior: Hunts in ghost-form, strikes in physical-form; cultivates by consuming ghosts
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: ghost_spirit_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
